revision.comment: Bot: mark 2 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24618454543|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:温泉利用指導者]]
{{Citation needed|date=2022-12-15}}
'''Onsen-​riyō Shidōsha''' (温泉利用指導者) is a qualification awarded to individuals who complete an eight-day training course conducted by the {{ill|Japan Health Development Foundation|de|Japanische Stiftung für Gesundheitsentwicklung|ja|一般財団法人日本健康開発財団|zh|日本健康开发财团|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japan Health Development Foundation|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Holders provide bathing instruction and general lifestyle guidance to those receiving {{ill|hot spring therapy|de|Thermalquellentherapie|ja|温泉療養|zh|温泉疗养|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hot spring therapy|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 温泉療法|1=Balneotherapy|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q2016490}} under the direction of a [[:en:Physician|physician]].
== Roles of Onsen-​riyō Shidōsha == * Implement bathing instruction and overall lifestyle guidance based on a hot spring therapy prescription prepared by a physician. * Manage facility safety and perform emergency life-saving procedures in the event of accidents.
== Program Overview == To obtain this qualification, candidates must complete an eight-day training course organized by the Japan Health Development Foundation. This is an advanced qualification above the {{ill|Onsen-​nyūyoku Shidōin|de|Onsen-Badeinstruktor|ja|温泉入浴指導員|1=Hot Spring Bathing Instructor|zh|温泉入浴指导员|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onsen-​nyūyoku Shidōin|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Spring Bathing Instructor|qq=}}. Prerequisites include being a {{ill|public health nurse|de|Öffentliche GesundheitskRankenschwester|ja|保健師|zh|公共卫生护士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/public health nurse|1=public health nurse|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q67529900}}, {{ill|registered dietitian|de|zugelassener Ernährungsberater|ja|管理栄養士|zh|注册营养师|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/registered dietitian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Registered dietitian|qid=Q11603267}}, {{ill|health exercise instructor|de|Gesundheitssportleiter|ja|健康運動指導士|zh|健康运动指导师|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/health exercise instructor|1=health exercise instructor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11387215}}, a graduate of a four-year {{ill|University of Physical Education|de|Sporthochschule|ja|体育大学|zh|体育大学|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/University of Physical Education|1=sports higher education institution|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1499580}}, etc. The curriculum covers health science, balneology, {{ill|thermal physiology & therapy|de|Thermophysiologie und Therapie|ja|温熱生理・治療学|zh|热生理与治疗学|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/thermal physiology & therapy|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135579089}}, first aid, and related subjects. Placement of an Onsen-​riyō Shidōsha is mandatory in Ministry-certified {{ill|hot spring utilization–type health promotion facilities|de|Thermalnutzungsprogramm-Gesundheitsförderungseinrichtungen|ja|温泉利用型健康増進施設|zh|温泉利用型健康促进设施|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/hot spring utilization–type health promotion facilities|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135579092}}. {| class="wikitable" ! Item !! {{ill|Hot Spring Bathing Instructor|ja|温泉入浴指導員|1=Hot Spring Bathing Instructor|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Spring Bathing Instructor|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Spring Bathing Instructor|qq=}} (温泉入浴指導員) !! {{ill|Hot Spring Utilization Instructor|ja|温泉利用指導者|1=Hot Spring Utilization Instructor|1qq=Hot Spring Instructor|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Spring Utilization Instructor|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Spring Utilization Instructor|qq=}} (温泉利用指導者) |- ! Purpose & target users | General bathers—guides healthy-use programs for any visitor. | Medically prescribed bathers—follows a physician’s treatment order. |- ! Training duration | 2 days | 8 days |- ! Prerequisites | None | Must already be a public health nurse, registered dietitian, health exercise instructor, four-year physical education graduate, etc. |- ! Qualification level | Basic qualification | Advanced qualification (above Onsen-nyūyoku Shidōin) |- ! Core curriculum | * Health science basics * Thermal-physiology * {{ill|Balneotherapy|en|Balneotherapy|qid=Q2016490|lt=Balneology|1=Balneotherapy}} * Bathing-program practicum * Lifesaving course (first aid & CPR) | * Health science * {{ill|Balneotherapy|en|Balneotherapy|qid=Q2016490|lt=Balneology|1=Balneotherapy}} * Thermal-physiology & therapy * First aid & CPR |- ! Facility designation | Placement required in Ministry-certified “hot spring program–type health promotion facilities.” | Placement required in Ministry-certified “hot spring utilization–type health promotion facilities.” |- ! Category tags | Required-placement qualification | Required-placement qualification; Medical qualification |}
== External links == * [http://www.jph-ri.or.jp/guide/shidousya.html]
== See also == * {{ill|Onsen|en|Onsen|qid=Q655311|lt=hot spring|1=Onsen}} * {{ill|Balneotherapy|en|Balneotherapy|qid=Q2016490|lt=balneotherapy|1=Balneotherapy}} * {{ill|Onsen-​nyūyoku Shidōin|de|Onsen-Badeinstruktor|ja|温泉入浴指導員|1=Hot Spring Bathing Instructor|zh|温泉入浴指导员|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onsen-​nyūyoku Shidōin|13=User:Immanuelle/Hot Spring Bathing Instructor|qq=}}
{{Onsen-stub}}
{{Onsen}} {{translated page|ja|温泉利用指導者|version=92912854|comment=Imported full ja history}}
